title: Four See Seers of the Cyclops
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Swirblies.jpg|thumb|250px|The See Seers with their Lord Being]]
The '''Four See Seers of the Cyclops''' were four beings of the [[Skakoan religion]]. According to myth, the four See Seers guarded the [[Eye of the Albino Cyclops]] within the [[Gates of Grontessiant]], which itself was located beyond the [[Threshold of the Hidden Realms]]. They were overseen by the [[Lord Being of the Swirblies|Lord Being]] of the [[Swirblies]], and judged individuals upon their worthiness to behold the [[Albino Cyclops]]. They were possibly Swirblies themselves.<ref name="SWV">{{StoryCite|story=Wat Tambor and the Quest for the Sacred Eye of the Albino Cyclops|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}</ref>
